﻿LEAD MAGNET CROWDSOURCE CALL

On this bonus call, we spent 75 minutes crowdsourcing ideas for each other's lead magnets. This was one of the most fun and productive sessions… and by just going through the replay and transcript, you’ll leave with at least a dozen new ideas for super effective lead magnets for your own business.
